## Data Provenance

**PROVENANCE COMPLETE**

Analysis type:          rare-variant-cohort
Analysis description:   Rare variant pathway enrichment analysis of 697 congenital heart defect probands from the Kids First program using BIFO-conditioned Personalized PageRank over the Data Distillery Knowledge Graph.

Variant type:           germline
Input data type:        germline-rare-variants
Input data description: Seeds are genes carrying predicted deleterious germline variants (MAF<0.01, CADD>=20) in 697 pediatric congenital heart defect probands from the Kids First Pediatric Research Program. This is a germline rare variant analysis — not a somatic mutation analysis. Canonically somatic drivers such as oncogene amplifications or structural rearrangements are not expected in the seed list. The enrichment signal reflects germline genetic burden across the cohort, not the somatic oncogenic landscape of any individual tumor.

  Name:                 KF-CHD
